prompt: In this late-street cash spot, choose the best action.
why_v1: Fold saves chips when price is poor and value is thin.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Folding fits the track cue set, so the line avoids paying off when the pressure story is working against you.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Fold here because the late-street cash price is too thin to keep paying off.
